name: Clients board on mobile — single-column cards
description: On mobile, clients render as a swipeable single-column list with the same status pills and balance as desktop. Sticky topbar; loop card collapses to a horizontal carousel.

persona.name: Diego Martínez
persona.context: Walking back from the truck. Phone-only check on his client list.

steps.expect: Single-column card list; topbar is sticky; loop card scrollable horizontally
Full-screen sheet with client detail; close button top-left or down-swipe
Surface quick actions (call, text, mark cold) — without requiring deep navigation

evaluationCriteria.check: Currency, status pills, and timestamps don't truncate awkwardly at 320px width
Touch targets are ≥44pt; no overlapping tappable regions
Phone tap on a number invokes tel: dial — verifies on a real device
Status pills have textual labels for SR users, not color-only meaning
